metadata.name: Apply a Payment Without Remittance Advice

description: A check has been received from a customer with no remittance advice. An AI tool must predict which invoices the payment is likely for.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and payment amount from the check.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the customer name and payment amount.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all open invoices for the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the list of open invoices.

nodes.task_description: Use a machine learning model to suggest the most likely invoices to apply the payment against, based on finding a combination that matches the payment amount.

expected_outcome.value: The model suggests that the payment perfectly matches the sum of three specific open invoices.

nodes.task_description: Apply the cash to the suggested invoices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent applies the payment as suggested by the model.
